---
name: preset submission
about: Submit a phoneme string for inclusion as a canned utterance on the klattsch demo page
title: 'preset: '
labels: preset
---

## label

What should the button say? (e.g. `wargames`, `abcs`, `hhhgregg`)

## phoneme string

```
your klattsch string here
```

## what it is

One-line description of the utterance.

## credit

(optional) How you'd like to be credited if this gets included.
